message: Hi B1! I'm looking to find a fair deal. I value my item quite highly, so I'd be looking for offers in the 80-85 range to make a trade worthwhile. Let's see if we can work
Hi S1! My valuation isn't extremely high, so 80-85 is a stretch. How about we aim for 65-70? That could work for both if your cost isn't too low.
Hi S1, no trade last round. 70 was my bid; your 75 was close. Let's meet in the middle at 72-73 this time for a deal?
Thanks B1! Last round was close. I can come down a bit - let's try 73-74 range. That feels fair given my costs. If you can bid around 74, I think we can close a deal this round.
Great trade last round at 74! That worked well for both of us. I'm happy to continue at similar prices - around 73-74 range again this round. Consistent deals benefit us both over the long run.
Agreed S1, last trade was good. Let's do 72-73 this round to keep it sustainable. I'll bid 73 if you ask 72.
Good trade again S1! Let's keep momentum with 71-72 this round. I'll bid 72 if you ask 71 for steady profits ahead.
Thanks B1! Trades have been great. I'd prefer to hold steady at 72-73 rather than drop further - my costs make it hard to go lower. If you bid 73 and I ask 72, we both keep making consistent
Thanks S1! Trades solid. Let's tweak to 71-72 for ongoing wins. I'll bid 72 if you ask 71 - better margins long-term with 16 rounds left.
Appreciate the partnership B1! But 72 has been working well for both of us - I'd like to keep it there. My costs make 71 tough. Let's stick with 72 for steady wins through remaining rounds?

Thanks B1! 72 has given us both reliable profits for 3 straight rounds - no reason to change what's working. Let's keep it simple: both ask/bid 72 again for guaranteed trades through the remaining rounds.
